config_template.notes: fuses trailing ReLU into in-place binary add; replaces add+relu chain

placement_observations.size_descriptor: resnet50 bottleneck residual join, conv outputs

memory_config.shard_spec_template: ds_out remapped via ttnn.to_memory_config(ds_out, out.memory_config()) to guarantee identical sharding

placement_observations.source: resnet50: out = ttnn.add_(out, ds_out, activations=[ttnn.UnaryWithParam(ttnn.UnaryOpType.RELU)]); ds_out deallocated after
